---
title: |
  Experienced Hasselblad and Nikon Specialist with Great Customer Focus | Leeds, UK 
    
  John Penfold | Focused Photograpic
pagetitle: Focused Photographic
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <script type="application/ld+json">
    {
      "@context": "https://schema.org",
      "@type": "CameraStore",
      "name": "Focused Photographic",
      "url": "https://focusedphotographic.com",
      "description": "Specialist UK dealer of new and used Hasselblad and Nikon camera systems of high quality.",
      "address": {
        "@type": "PostalAddress",
        "addressLocality": "Your City",
        "addressCountry": "GB"
      },
      "brand": [
        {"@type": "Brand", "name": "Hasselblad"},
        {"@type": "Brand", "name": "Nikon"}
      ]
    }
    </script>
css: styles.css
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image: JP.webp
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:focusedphotographic@hotmail.com"
    - icon: cart3
      text: My e-bay
      href: "http://www.ebay.co.uk/sch/imagingeye/m.html?_nkw=&_armrs=1&_ipg=&_from="
    - icon: telephone
      text: 07917 116974
---

:::{#hero-heading}
:::

<br/>

::: {.camera-list}
- I'd love to hear from you ... whether you're buying, selling or just want some guidance
- You're always welcome to visit me, either in Leeds or in my usual spot at the main camera fairs (including Photographica, Wolverhampton and Frome)
- After starting in the camera business in 1990, I've run Focused Photographic since 2004, giving great customer service with a particular speciality in Hasselblad and Nikon
:::
